about: Just a Swiss Gamer that wants to promote switzerland and specially its rap to other people, i stream stuff like DBD, DayZ and Chivlary 2 and a lot more. I am a mod for @smokez_10 @nap_tek @duskwolfttv and @mercuryfallen

panels.title: ABOUT ME
panels.text:
I am a swiss gamer, new to DBD and i play other games like the isle DayZ etc

I am autistic and i love educating about it so feel free to ask anything about it and i will do my best to answer :D

Im currently visiting in the USA thats why im in US servers as swiss :D

DBD topic:
Any insults etc are not directed to the actual person, its usually just frustration on my side or possible cheaters.
I try to not be toxic etc but sometimes it just comes out
GG and good luck next match :D

panels.title: RULES
panels.text:
General banter is allowed but dont be toxic or insult somebody for real

me and my mods take the right to punish anyone however we want.
If ur nice tho u shouldnt have a problem, critique and tips etc are welcome :D
